animations.fade_in_up: Framer motion, initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }
animations.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query via Framer Motion

accessibility_requirements.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG 2.2 AA minimum 4.5:1 ratio
accessibility_requirements.aria: Use semantic tags, correct heading levels (H1 -> H2 -> H3), and proper aria-labels
accessibility_requirements.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='quote-submit-btn')
accessibility_requirements.forms: Accessible form validation with error messages tied to inputs via aria-describedby

features.floating_accessibility_panel: Interactive fixed panel toggling contrast, text scale, and screen reader visual simulator.
features.comparison_slider: Interactive before/after slider comparing untagged PDF vs fully tagged screen-reader compliant PDF structure.
features.quote_form: Integrates with FastAPI backend to store in MongoDB.
features.email_alerts: FastAPI to trigger Resend email on new quote submission.

sections: Hero: High-impact outcome headline, large whitespace, floating UI dashboard elements, primary 'Request Quote' CTA
Trust Section: Monochromatic logos of Enterprise, Gov, Healthcare clients to build instant credibility
Services: Bento grid layout highlighting PDF Remediation, Web Audits, WCAG/ADA Compliance
Why Choose AccessVerse: Technical depth showcasing expertise in VPAT and Section 508
Process: Animated vertical or horizontal timeline explaining the audit to remediation lifecycle
Before & After Accessibility: The interactive comparison slider component
Testimonials: Elegant cards with soft shadows and professional headshots
Call To Action: High-contrast soft blue/cyan subtle gradient container, bold typography
Footer: Clean, expansive, semantic links with a sophisticated layout
Quote-Request Review Dashboard: A clean, functional internal dashboard to view submissions stored in MongoDB.

hero_abstract.description: Futuristic ceiling showcasing modern architectural design. Use for subtle abstract tech background.

trust_logos.description: University/Hospital placeholder logo for Trust Section (convert to grayscale)
Enterprise Building placeholder for Trust Section (convert to grayscale)

instructions_to_main_agent: Design Phase 1 Focus: Build the Design System and the Homepage, plus a clean quote-request review dashboard for submissions.
Follow the 'Apple/Stripe' premium SaaS aesthetic: Pure white backgrounds, extremely clean spacing, soft inner shadows, and high contrast typography.

Typography Rule: The user strictly requested 'Inter'. Use Inter for everything. Make headings look premium by using tight tracking (e.g., tracking-tight or tracking-tighter) and semi-bold/medium weights.
Build a custom 'Floating Accessibility Panel' (fixed positioning) that actually toggles text scale and contrast. This proves the company's expertise.
Build the Before/After Comparison Slider to compare code/tagging representations (e.g., untagged PDF vs fully tagged screen-reader compliant PDF).
Integrate Shadcn UI components but customize them to remove the default 'Vercel' look; use the defined border radii (rounded-xl/2xl) and soft shadows.
Backend: Set up FastAPI to handle quote submissions, store them in MongoDB, and trigger an email via Resend.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute for automated testing.
